auth.subtitle: Personalized health analytics
auth.heroTitle: Turn routine body metrics into a dashboard worth checking every day.
auth.heroDescription: Track your body composition, calorie targets, and long-term movement with a polished workspace designed for clarity.
auth.guestHint: Guest mode stores your metrics only in this browser, so you can explore the dashboard before creating an account.

dashboard.title: Body metrics, trendlines, and practical decisions in one view.
dashboard.description: Save your latest numbers, monitor changes over time, and use the built-in calculations to stay aligned with your health goals.
dashboard.weightHistoryHint: Every saved entry is plotted so the trend stays easy to read at a glance.
dashboard.noData: Add your first entry to unlock analytics.

metrics.dailyCaloriesHint: Calculated using your BMR and activity multiplier.

insights.underweight: Your BMI indicates you may be underweight. Consider increasing calorie intake and prioritizing nutrient-dense meals.
insights.healthy: Your BMI sits in a healthy range. Focus on consistency, recovery, and maintaining balanced nutrition.
insights.overweight: Your BMI suggests extra body weight. A modest calorie deficit and regular activity could help improve balance.
insights.empty: Save a metric entry to receive personalized rule-based recommendations.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
